title: Loctite Extreme Glue Gel, High-Strength Clear Adhesive for Tough Repairs, Bonds Wood, Metal, Glass, Stone & Plastics, Shock & Temperature Resistant, 20g Tube
features: FAST – The all purpose adhesive provides a powerful initial strength to bond a range of materials with long-lasting effects both indoors and outdoors.
BRUTAL – The fast-setting bonding glue ensures strong bonds on both flexible and rigid materials and can even be used for challenging materials such as leather.
PERSISTENT – The versatile, fast setting glue also promises high-quality bonding under challenging conditions, reaching its final strength after 24 hours.
Multi-material – This strong adhesive performs well on most materials such as wood, metal, glass, textiles or plastics* and can be used on large surfaces.
All Purpose Glue, high-quality clear liquid glue for a range of needs and materials including wood, metal, stone, glass and plastics*, transparent
description: From the manufacturer About Loctite At Loctite we have been leading global adhesive solutions for more than 50 years. Our products distinguish themselves through exceptional drying speed, strength, durability and ease of use. We have been proud to partner with the aerospace industry, and professional athletes to work on the best adhesive solutions for your daily life products from smartphones to sneakers. Through connecting with our customers as well as constantly innovating, we strive to offer the best solutions for your needs. Loctite Extreme Glue 20g All-purpose glue with toughened strength, power, and resistance Looking for glue with extreme resistance for repairing the sole of a shoe, some broken pottery, or even a front door sign? Loctite Extreme Glue is an elastic all-purpose gel with extreme hold for gluing and repairing almost any material*. The gel is shock-proof, water and temperature resistant, while its non-drip gel formula allows clean and safe application even on vertical surfaces. The transparent and solvent-free Extreme Glue gel can be used both indoors and outdoors. Shock, water, and temperature-resistant For indoor and outdoor use Dries clear For various materials* Technology: Flextec Polymer *Not suitable for waxy or soft plastics (e.g. PP, PE, PTFE, vinyl) 1 x 20g Tube SAY NO to waste It's no secret that waste generation has heavily increased around the world. According to World Waste Facts, we dump a massive 2.21 billion tons of waste every year. SAY YES to Repair and Reuse At Loctite, we believe that old and broken objects should be given a second chance. Before you throw them away, why not ask yourself: can it be fixed or even improved? We think it's time for us to start valuing our belongings rather than always looking for the next purpose. SAY YES to #Loctite2ndChance Everyone can make a difference by giving old and broken objects a 2nd life: especially YOU as a fixer or maker. And every saved object counts because it means one less item in a landfill. So, what are you waiting for? All it takes is just one drop of Loctite Superglue. Step by step Step 1: Clean the desired surfaces for bonding and make sure they are dry. Step 2: Carefully remove the cap. Step 3: Apply a thin layer of glue to one surface only. Parts are repositionable within 5 minutes. Step 4: Immediately press both parts firmly together and fix with tape or a clamp for 30 minutes. Glue will be fully dry after 24hrs. Step 5: Replace the cap immediately and store tube upright in a cool, dry place. Not suitable for PE, PP or PFTE, silicone rubber, very soft leather or foams. Not suitable for food contact) Removes glue spillages, ink, marker stains and sticky residues Colour Transparent Transparent Transparent Transparent Transparent Transparent Solvent-free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
